feed.title: AJH Daily Builds - RSS Feed
feed.subtitle: Latest updates from the daily-built AJH website

entry.title: Day 21 - PWA Installability & RSS Feed
entry.content: Added PWA manifest for installability, custom app icons, RSS feed for blog updates, and enhanced the service worker for offline support.

entry.title: Day 20 - Offline Support & SEO
entry.content: Added sitemap.xml for search engine crawling, robots.txt for crawler directives, custom SVG favicon, and service worker for offline support.

entry.title: Day 19 - Page Analytics & Cursor Trail
entry.content: Created custom SVG OG image for social sharing, added page view analytics tracking, and custom cursor glow trail effect.

entry.title: Day 18 - Contact System & Interactive Enhancements
entry.content: Added functional contact form with Formspree, newsletter signup, project gallery, and keyboard shortcuts panel.

entry.title: Day 17 - Social Media SEO & UX Enhancement
entry.content: Added Twitter Card meta tags, scroll-to-top button, and improved footer social links accessibility.
